LanguageData.UB_BTC_Vaultborn.title: vaultborn
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Vaultborn.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born inside a massive underground vault, the last refuge of a collapsing empire. While other children played, [PAWN_pronoun] studied history, engineering, and survival—preparing for a world [PAWN_pronoun] would never see until it was too late.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_LastGeneration.title: last generation
LanguageData.UB_BTC_PrivateColony.title: private colony
LanguageData.UB_BTC_CloudWalker.title: cloud walker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_CloudWalker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew between sky platforms harvesting atmospheric water vapor. Underfoot, perpetual fusion reactors hummed the city's lullaby.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Hydronaut.title: hydronaut
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Hydronaut.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up beneath the waves, in a pressurized dome clinging to the ocean floor. Bioluminescent gardens and abyssal currents were [PAWN_possessive] childhood playground.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Metropolitan.title: metropolitan
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Rimworld.title: rimworld
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Glassborn.title: glassborn
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Glassborn.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in a biodome, in one of the least habitable places on the planet. [PAWN_pronoun] was raised among artificial forests and sterile air, safe from the poisoned wasteland beyond.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Clanfolk.title: clanfolk
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Sleeper01.title: sleeper
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Sleeper01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was nobody special. When the world burned, [PAWN_pronoun] ran—only to find [PAWN_objective]self in a facility offering ‘safe’ passage into the future. [PAWN_pronoun] took the deal. Now, centuries later, [PAWN_pronoun] woke up to a world even more hostile than the one [PAWN_pronoun] left.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientTechnician01.title: ancient technician
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientTechnician02.title: routine technician
LanguageData.UB_BTC_LastDiplomat.title: last diplomat
LanguageData.UB_BTC_EternalRival.title: eternal rival
LanguageData.UB_BTC_CryptoInsurgent.title: crypto insurgent
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientGeneral.title: ancient general
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Sleeper02.title: sleeper
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Scout01.title: perimeter guard
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Scientist01.title: ancient scientist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Assassin01.title: assassin
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier01.title: ancient soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier02.title: ancient soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier03.title: vault security
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier04.title: clan soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier05.title: ancient soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier05.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a soldier fighting in the last great war. When the final battle was lost, [PAWN_possessive] superiors decided [PAWN_pronoun] was more useful as a contingency plan than as a corpse.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_TrappedElite.title: trapped elite
LanguageData.UB_BTC_RepurposedCaretaker.title: repurposed caretaker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_StructuralEngineer.title: structural engineer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Bioengineer.title: bioengineer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ExcavationSpecialist.title: excavation specialist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ExcavationSpecialist.description: The vaults needed more than just space—they needed expansion, resources, and reinforced tunnels that could last for centuries. [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in deep excavation, operating precision mining rigs and shaping the underground world to support those who lived within it.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientPilot.title: ancient pilot
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientCommander.title: ancient commander
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientCommander.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a rebel cell that used cryptosleep caskets to skip decades between operations, waiting to strike at the empire's weak points. \nWhen [PAWN_pronoun] finally emerged for [PAWN_possessive] last mission, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] entire network obliterated by shifting politics and forgotten wars. The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientGeneral.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a rebel cell that used cryptosleep caskets to skip decades between operations, waiting to strike at the empire's weak points. \nWhen [PAWN_pronoun] finally emerged for [PAWN_possessive] last mission, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] entire network obliterated by shifting politics and forgotten wars. The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientPilot.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a rebel cell that used cryptosleep caskets to skip decades between operations, waiting to strike at the empire's weak points. \nWhen [PAWN_pronoun] finally emerged for [PAWN_possessive] last mission, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] entire network obliterated by shifting politics and forgotten wars. The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_AncientSoldier01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a rebel cell that used cryptosleep caskets to skip decades between operations, waiting to strike at the empire's weak points. \nWhen [PAWN_pronoun] finally emerged for [PAWN_possessive] last mission, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] entire network obliterated by shifting politics and forgotten wars. The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.

The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.

The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.

The years in stasis left [PAWN_pronoun] with sharpened combat instincts and technical knowledge, but no cause to fight for.
